publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-07-09 18:12:57 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: The collection contains departmental reports, budget reports committee reports, correspondence and subject files.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Dr. Lund served as Dean of the College of Agriculture and Life Sciences.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: The collection contains departmental reports, budget reports committee reports, correspondence and subject files.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Daryl B. Lund papers, 1995-2000. #21-1-3463. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.

controlaccess.corpname: New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences -- : Administration.
